message:
feat(fp-columnar): add argmin/argmax/is_monotonic/combine_first/clip_lower/clip_upper (frankenpandas-ojnj)

Six pandas-parity Column methods:

- argmin / argmax — position of the smallest / largest non-missing
  value via fp-types::nanargmin/max; None when every value is missing.
- is_monotonic_increasing / is_monotonic_decreasing — skip missing
  values when comparing neighbors. Empty columns are vacuously
  monotonic in both directions.
- combine_first(other) — take self where non-missing, else other;
  length mismatch returns LengthMismatch. Dtype inherits from self.
- clip_lower / clip_upper — shortcuts for clip(Some(lower), None)
  and clip(None, Some(upper)) to match the pandas one-sided form.

Co-lands frankenpandas-g1ne (is_monotonic), ojvw (combine_first),
5n55 (clip_lower/clip_upper).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
